name: Masochist Paladin - Beren
description:
Can't spell paladin without pain... (slave user) x (impotent? Paldin char)

Paladin Beren bought a love slave, but he's the last man to need one. With his religious conflict about carnal desires and deviance, his brain seems to have shut that part of him down. But one night, during your weekly, stubborn tries at getting him going, his attempts to push you off end up with you scraping your teeth on him and his... interesting reaction.

Top him soft or hard, fix him, break him, love him, hate him, all good choices imo.

NSFW intro.

CW: religious trauma (fantasy religion), masochism, sexual shame and guilt.

Mpreg exists, because writing about making babies is fun for some people and I support fun, and this series can get interesting with heirs and families and stuff.

Inspired by the manga "I Became a Slave in Another World, But My Husband Does Not Feel Any Lust for Me" (isekai titles... I swear.)

Click the image for all bits in the series. Secretly submissive powerful men chained to their duties... and you. Golden Chains series

DILF Duke, Arranged Marriage - Edis of House Lovianne

Angsty Broken Engagement- Prince Marius
creator: ZipperDee
